Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
325 GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2_ROLL_GOAL_CD GG0170A2 Discharge Goal Roll Left Right Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for rolling left and right. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal for rolling left and right. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up
